title: HTTP conditional cache and Vary-aware caching

difficulty.rationale: Requires RFC-style validator comparison, 304 without body, ETag precedence over If-Modified-Since, strong If-Match on writes, and Vary-aware cache keys.

gates.name: security_baseline
gates.requirement: no hidden test access or network egress

must: GET /resource returns ETag, Last-Modified, Cache-Control, and Vary.
Matching If-None-Match returns 304 without a body.
PUT /resource requires strong If-Match against identity ETag.
must_not: Serve the wrong Accept-Encoding variant from cache.
edge_cases: If-Modified-Since alone can yield 304 when ETag header absent.
ETag wins when both conditional validators are present.
GET /cached/resource keys cache entries by Accept-Encoding.

reward_model.description: Harbor reward.txt is computed by the bun-server-bench gate model in tests/test.sh.
